{{Quote|By the seven moons of Skärtis—it's them!|Kharys' spy|<ref name="hunt">[[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]]</ref>}}
'''Skärtis''', or '''Skartis''', was a resort [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]] that was maintained by [[House Araba]]. Its seven moons were famous for their complicated [[Orbit/Legends|orbits]]. Seeing all seven in the sky at once was said to be a lucky omen.<ref name="TEA" />
